topic: Ralph post-fix review after router/a11y fixes
result_json: {"status":"completed","verdict":"BLOCK","findings":["[critical] Tauri ACL/capabilities are still empty while the React app depends on IPC during first render: `apps/desktop/src/lib/api.ts:89` calls `invoke(\"load_config\")`, `apps/desktop/src/components/PreferenceShell.tsx:14` triggers `refresh()` on mount, but `apps/desktop/src-tauri/gen/schemas/capabilities.json:1` is `{}` and there is no `apps/desktop/src-tauri/capabilities/*.json` file. In Tauri 2, allowed commands are resolved from capabilities; with no capability granting the custom commands, `load_config` is denied and the shell remains in the loading state instead of rendering the migrated views.","[high] The post-fix custom titlebar adds controls that call window plugin commands without corresponding permissions: `apps/desktop/src/components/PreferenceShell.tsx:21` uses `data-tauri-drag-region`, `apps/desktop/src/components/PreferenceShell.tsx:26` calls `appWindow.close()`, and `apps/desktop/src/components/PreferenceShell.tsx:32` calls `appWindow.minimize()`. The generated `core:window:default` permission set does not include `allow-close`, `allow-minimize`, or `allow-start-dragging`, and the app has no capability file to add them; with `apps/desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json:19` setting `decorations: false`, failed drag/close/minimize leaves the window without working native controls.","[medium] The previous nested interactive control issue in Favorites is fixed, but the edit gesture still has a side effect: `apps/desktop/src/views/FavoritesView.tsx:95` opens the directory on every row click, while `apps/desktop/src/views/FavoritesView.tsx:121` enters edit mode only on double-click of the name. Browser double-click dispatches the individual click events first, so attempting to edit a favorite name opens Finder before edit mode starts. Use a separate explicit open button/action, or suppress row open when the name cell is the interaction target."],"summary":"Post-fix review confirmed the wave-4 React Router blocker is fixed: `apps/desktop/src/App.tsx:5` now renders `RouterProvider`, and `apps/desktop/src/router/index.tsx:12` places `PreferenceShell` inside router context before its `NavLink`s. The NewFile duplicate Enter save is fixed (`apps/desktop/src/views/NewFileTemplatesView.tsx:50-53` only blurs; rename happens on blur at `:110`), and ARIA table roles now include columnheader/cell roles in the reviewed table-like views. Verification run: `pnpm --filter @sright/desktop typecheck`, `pnpm --filter @sright/desktop build`, and `cargo check -p sright-desktop` all passed. Review still blocks because the Tauri IPC/capability contract appears incomplete for both app commands and the new undecorated-window controls.","residual_risks":["I did not launch `tauri dev` interactively, so the ACL findings are based on source/generated capability inspection plus Tauri 2 authority behavior, not a live WebView console trace.","Frontend keyboard/a11y behavior was reviewed statically; no component or e2e tests exist for the migrated views.","Current working tree contains concurrent unstaged/staged edits in `PreferenceShell.tsx`, `layout.less`, and `tauri.conf.json`; this review evaluated the current working tree as seen during the job."],"confidence":0.88}
